title: campanula tomentosa var. sporadum
intro: Campanula tomentosa var. sporadum, also known as the woolly bellflower, is a variety of flowering plant in the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campanula tomentosa var. sporadum are said to include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
